document_title: 22 - Competitive Deep Dive: Games & Repositories Analysis
purpose: Detailed analysis of reference games and open-source repositories for mechanics, features, and code patterns to borrow, adapt, or avoid in Idle Kingdom Revolution.

yet_another_idle_rpg.name: Yet Another Idle RPG
yet_another_idle_rpg.tech_stack: JavaScript (vanilla), HTML, CSS - pure browser game
yet_another_idle_rpg.license: Open source (check repo for specific license)

combat_system.description: Turn-based auto-combat with attack speed, defense, evasion stats
combat_system.details: Player and enemies take turns based on attack speed. Damage = attack - defense (with minimum 1). Evasion chance based on agility difference.
combat_system.borrow_for_ikr: Attack speed-based turn order, evasion mechanics, minimum damage guarantee
combat_system.adaptation: Add formation bonuses, class synergies, skill abilities on top of base system

skill_system.description: Passive skill trees with unlockable bonuses
skill_system.details: Skills unlock as player progresses areas. Each skill gives permanent passive bonus (damage, defense, gold, XP). No active skills - all passive.
skill_system.borrow_for_ikr: Passive perk trees by category (combat, economy, utility)
skill_system.adaptation: Add active abilities triggered in battle, synergy bonuses for completing trees

area_progression.description: Linear area unlock with increasing difficulty
area_progression.details: Each area has enemies with scaled stats. Beat area boss to unlock next. Can farm previous areas for gold/XP.
area_progression.borrow_for_ikr: Area-based progression with farming option, boss gate for next area
area_progression.adaptation: Add map nodes (battle, resource, event types), fast travel, fog of war

equipment_system.description: Simple equipment slots with stat bonuses
equipment_system.details: Weapon, armor, accessory slots. Items drop from enemies with random stats. Rarity tiers (common to legendary).
equipment_system.borrow_for_ikr: Equipment slots, rarity tiers, random stat rolls
equipment_system.adaptation: Add upgrade system (+1 to +15), set bonuses, crafting from materials

prestige_system.details: As you defeat enemies, you gain mastery in that enemy type, giving permanent bonuses against them.
prestige_system.borrow_for_ikr: Enemy mastery system as secondary progression
prestige_system.adaptation: Add faction mastery (bonus vs orcs, undead, etc.), weapon type mastery

offline_progression.description: Offline earnings based on last area
offline_progression.details: While offline, auto-farm gold/XP from highest unlocked area. Cap at 8 hours.
offline_progression.borrow_for_ikr: Offline farming from highest area, time cap
offline_progression.adaptation: Add offline boosters, configurable cap via admin, bonus for consecutive logins

ui_ux_patterns.borrow_for_ikr: Clean minimal UI, detailed combat log, equipment comparison tooltips
ui_ux_patterns.avoid: No mobile support, no cloud save, no animations

code_patterns.data_storage: Hardcoded JSON objects for enemies, items
code_patterns.borrow_for_ikr: Data structure patterns for enemies/items, combat formula logic
code_patterns.avoid: Single-file architecture, setInterval (use requestAnimationFrame), hardcoded data

yet_another_idle_rpg.verdict: Good reference for core idle RPG mechanics and data structures. UI patterns worth borrowing. Architecture and tech stack to avoid - use modern React/Next.js instead.

idle_fantasy.name: Idle Fantasy
idle_fantasy.license: Open source (likely MIT or GPL - verify in repo)

hero_collection.description: Gacha-style hero summoning with rarity tiers
hero_collection.details: Summon heroes using in-game currency. Heroes have stars (1-5), classes, elements. Higher stars = better stats.
hero_collection.borrow_for_ikr: Gacha summoning circle, star/ascension system, element/class combinations
hero_collection.adaptation: Add pity system, rate-up banners, guaranteed epic every X pulls

team_formation.details: Front row takes more damage, back row deals more. Class synergies when specific combinations present.
team_formation.adaptation: Expand to 3x3 grid, add faction synergies, tactical hints

campaign_progression.details: Story divided into chapters, each with multiple battles. 3-star rating system based on performance.
campaign_progression.borrow_for_ikr: Chapter-based story structure, star ratings per battle
campaign_progression.adaptation: Add branching paths, hidden chapters, chapter rewards

idle_earnings.details: Based on highest completed chapter. Collect manually or auto-collect on login.
idle_earnings.adaptation: Add offline cap, boosters, multiple resource types

equipment_enhancement.details: Use materials from battles to upgrade equipment. Risk of failure at higher levels.
equipment_enhancement.borrow_for_ikr: Material-based upgrades, failure chance at high levels
equipment_enhancement.adaptation: Add safety items (prevent downgrade on fail), guaranteed success items

daily_activities.description: Daily quests, login rewards, limited-time dungeons
daily_activities.details: Rotating daily content to encourage daily play without forcing long sessions.
daily_activities.borrow_for_ikr: Daily quest rotation, login calendar, limited dungeons
daily_activities.adaptation: Add weekly/monthly calendars, streak bonuses, catch-up mechanics

ui_ux_patterns.borrow_for_ikr: Mobile-first responsive design, hero gallery, smooth transitions

code_patterns.architecture: MVVM with Room database, Repository pattern
code_patterns.data_storage: Room database with entities for heroes, items, progress
code_patterns.borrow_for_ikr: Repository pattern for data access, entity relationships, async game operations
code_patterns.avoid: Android-specific code (use web APIs), LiveData (use Zustand/TanStack Query)

idle_fantasy.verdict: Excellent reference for mobile idle RPG UX and gacha mechanics. Code architecture patterns valuable. Monetization approach to avoid - focus on fair/free first.

melvor_idle.name: Melvor Idle
melvor_idle.tech_stack: JavaScript (browser), later ported to multiple platforms

skill_system.details: Combat skills (attack, strength, defense, ranged, magic) + non-combat (woodcutting, fishing, mining, crafting, etc.). Each skill has its own XP bar and unlocks.
skill_system.borrow_for_ikr: Multiple parallel progression systems, skill trees with unlocks
skill_system.adaptation: Combat skills (sword, bow, magic, defense) + kingdom skills (mining, crafting, alchemy)

bank_system.description: Extensive inventory/bank with tabs and organization
bank_system.details: Items stack, bank has tabs, search, sorting. Equipment sets can be saved/loaded.
bank_system.borrow_for_ikr: Organized inventory with tabs, equipment sets, search/filter
bank_system.adaptation: Add auto-sort, favorite items, quick-equip sets

combat_triangle.details: Classic rock-paper-scissors for combat styles. Using correct style gives accuracy bonus.
combat_triangle.borrow_for_ikr: Combat triangle for class balance, accuracy bonuses
combat_triangle.adaptation: Warrior > Ranger > Mage > Warrior, with visual indicators

slayer_tasks.description: Bounty system - kill X of specific enemy type
slayer_tasks.details: Slayer master assigns tasks. Completing gives bonus XP and rewards. Tasks get harder as level increases.
slayer_tasks.adaptation: Multiple bounty boards (daily, weekly, guild), scaling difficulty

dungeoneering.details: Enter dungeon, fight through rooms, get loot, boss at end. Different dungeon tiers.
dungeoneering.adaptation: Add dungeon modifiers, daily dungeons, guild dungeons

mastery_system.details: Using a specific item/skill increases its mastery, unlocking permanent bonuses.
mastery_system.borrow_for_ikr: Item mastery, skill mastery, enemy mastery
mastery_system.adaptation: Weapon mastery (bonus with specific weapon type), unit mastery (bonus with specific unit)

weaknesses: Overwhelming for new players (20+ skills at once)
ui_ux_patterns.borrow_for_ikr: Tab navigation, progress bars, stat breakdowns, offline summary, mod support concept
ui_ux_patterns.avoid: Overwhelming new players, no story, pure grind

melvor_idle.verdict: Best reference for deep progression systems and skill variety. Bank/inventory system exemplary. Need to simplify onboarding and add narrative layer.

trimps.name: Trimps

prestige_system.description: Portal system - reset progress for permanent bonuses
prestige_system.details: Complete a 'run' by reaching certain milestone, then 'Portal' to reset most progress but gain permanent 'Helium' currency for upgrades. Each run is faster due to bonuses.
prestige_system.adaptation: Add 'Kingdom Reset' - reset chapter progress for 'Royal Seals' used for permanent kingdom upgrades

permanent_upgrades.details: Helium buys upgrades like +5% damage, +10% gold, new abilities. These persist across all future runs.
permanent_upgrades.borrow_for_ikr: Permanent upgrade shop with incremental costs
permanent_upgrades.adaptation: Royal Seal shop with categories: combat, economy, utility, quality of life

challenge_system.details: Complete run with specific restriction (e.g., no healers, only warriors) for bonus rewards. Unlocks new permanent upgrades.
challenge_system.borrow_for_ikr: Challenge modes with restrictions and bonus rewards
challenge_system.adaptation: Daily challenges, weekly challenges, seasonal challenges with leaderboard

automation_unlocks.details: Early game requires manual clicking. Mid-game unlocks auto-fighting. Late-game unlocks auto-portal, auto-equip, etc.
automation_unlocks.adaptation: Unlock automation via perks/achievements, not just progression

zone_scaling.details: Each zone enemies get ~1.5x stronger. Player must optimize build to push further. Soft caps create natural progression walls.
zone_scaling.borrow_for_ikr: Exponential scaling, soft caps, build optimization
zone_scaling.adaptation: Battle field scaling with recommended power ratings

strengths: Extensive numbers and stats (appeals to math-oriented players)
ui_ux_patterns.borrow_for_ikr: Progressive automation, challenge system, permanent upgrades, stat-heavy UI option
ui_ux_patterns.avoid: Ugly UI, no mobile, no story

trimps.verdict: Best reference for prestige/endgame loop and automation design. Challenge system directly applicable. UI to avoid - we want beautiful, not utilitarian.

realm_grinder.name: Realm Grinder

faction_system.description: Choose faction with unique bonuses and playstyles
faction_system.details: Good (Fairy, Elf, Angel) vs Evil (Goblin, Undead, Demon) vs Neutral (Titan, Druid, Faceless). Each has unique buildings, spells, upgrades.
faction_system.borrow_for_ikr: Faction choice with unique bonuses, buildings, abilities
faction_system.adaptation: Kingdom alignment (Order, Chaos, Nature) with unique unit pools and perks

alignment_mechanics.details: First reset unlocks Neutral factions. Second unlocks Prestige factions (unique combinations). Each alignment has its own progression.
alignment_mechanics.borrow_for_ikr: Prestige unlocks new factions/alignments with unique mechanics
alignment_mechanics.adaptation: Kingdom Reset unlocks new kingdom types (Empire, Horde, Alliance) with unique units and buildings

spell_system.description: Active spells with cooldowns and combos
spell_system.details: Each faction has unique spells. Casting spells in sequence creates combos. Spells have durations and cooldowns.
spell_system.borrow_for_ikr: Active abilities/spells with cooldowns and combos
spell_system.adaptation: Unit active abilities, commander spells, combo system for battle

research_system.details: Spend research points (from playtime) to unlock permanent bonuses. Research trees by category.
research_system.borrow_for_ikr: Research/perk trees with points from playtime
research_system.adaptation: Kingdom research - spend XP or special currency for permanent bonuses

trophy_system.details: Hundreds of trophies for various accomplishments. Each gives small permanent bonus. Collecting many unlocks more.
trophy_system.borrow_for_ikr: Extensive achievement system with permanent bonuses

strengths: Faction choice is meaningful and replayable
Progression feels endless (in a good way)
Spell combo system adds active engagement
ui_ux_patterns.borrow_for_ikr: Faction system, trophy/achievement bonuses, spell combos, research trees

realm_grinder.verdict: Best reference for faction/replayability design and long-term achievement systems. Spell combo system excellent for active battle engagement.

kings_bounty_legions.name: King's Bounty: Legions

tactical_combat.description: Hex-based tactical battles with unit abilities
tactical_combat.details: Units move on hex grid, have abilities with cooldowns, terrain affects movement and combat. Hero casts spells.
tactical_combat.borrow_for_ikr: Hex or grid-based tactical movement, terrain effects, hero spells
tactical_combat.adaptation: Simplified grid (3x3 formation), terrain bonuses, commander abilities

unit_variety.details: Humans, elves, dwarves, undead, demons each have unique unit rosters. Units have special abilities.
unit_variety.borrow_for_ikr: Faction-specific unit pools, unit special abilities
unit_variety.adaptation: 7 classes x 6 factions = 42 base unit types, each with unique ability

hero_progression.description: Hero levels up, learns spells, equips artifacts
hero_progression.details: Hero is separate from army. Gains XP, levels up, learns new spells, equips artifacts for army-wide bonuses.
hero_progression.adaptation: Commander system - choose commander with unique aura and spell, level up independently

pvp_arena.description: Async PvP against other players' armies
pvp_arena.details: Attack other players' defensive formations. AI controls defender. Rankings and rewards.
pvp_arena.adaptation: Arena system - set defense formation, attack others, daily ranking rewards

quest_campaign.details: Move on world map, complete quests, fight battles, discover locations. Branching paths.
quest_campaign.borrow_for_ikr: World map exploration, branching quest paths, discoverable locations
quest_campaign.adaptation: Chapter-based map with hidden paths, secret bosses, lore collectibles

weaknesses: Server shutdown risk (original web version died)
ui_ux_patterns.borrow_for_ikr: Tactical depth, hero system, PvP arena, campaign structure
ui_ux_patterns.avoid: Pay-to-win energy system, premium unit advantage, server dependency

kings_bounty_legions.verdict: Closest to our vision in terms of tactical combat and hero system. PvP arena directly applicable. Monetization to avoid completely - we go fair/free first.

what_works: Faction/alignment choice with unique playstyles (Realm Grinder, KB: Legions)
Chapter/area-based story progression (Idle Fantasy, KB: Legions)
Offline earnings with cap (YAIdleRPG, Idle Fantasy)
what_to_avoid: Server dependency (KB: Legions web version died)

ikr_synthesis.core_loop: Trimps prestige + Idle Fantasy chapter progression + Melvor skill variety
ikr_synthesis.combat: KB: Legions tactical depth + YAIdleRPG turn order + Melvor combat triangle
ikr_synthesis.progression: Realm Grinder factions + Melvor mastery + Trimps automation
ikr_synthesis.monetization: Idle Fantasy gacha (fair version) + Melvor expansion model (cosmetics/content)
ikr_synthesis.social: KB: Legions async PvP + Realm Grinder leaderboards
ikr_synthesis.story: KB: Legions campaign structure + chapter-based narrative (unique to IKR)
